theme_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast - Dark Mode Variant) with Luxury Undertones
theme_archetype.rationale: OmniVibe is a premium AI-powered project orchestration dashboard. Users expect a calm, dark-first workspace. We use deep neutral zinc greys to prevent eye strain during extended sessions. The stark contrast of white typography and structural borders provides absolute clarity, while a 'Signal Orange' accent is reserved exclusively for AI generation actions to guide focus.

rules: Avoid default bolding. Use font-medium or font-light to create tension.
Never use generic Inter for headings.
For database schemas and API endpoints, use mono_font (JetBrains Mono) for field names and URLs to establish a 'developer tool' aesthetic.

layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 bg-[#09090B] flex flex-col
layout.ai_panel: w-80 border-l border-zinc-800 bg-[#121214] flex flex-col shadow-[inset_1px_0_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.02)]
layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside primary cards. gap-6 for bento grid items.
layout.container_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-md for inputs/buttons.
layout.grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with varied spans (Bento Grid) for the Overview tab.

components.cards: Flat background (#18181B), 1px solid border (border-zinc-800). No box-shadow. On hover, apply subtle background shift to #27272A.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-800 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.ai_action: bg-[#FF4400] text-white hover:bg-[#E63D00] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,68,0,0.3)] transition-all rounded-md px-4 py-2

components.inputs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-zinc-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-600 text-zinc-100 placeholder-zinc-600 rounded-md
components.glassmorphism: Use purely for the sticky header in the main content area: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#09090B]/80 border-b border-zinc-800.
components.kanban: Columns use bg-zinc-900/50 rounded-xl p-4. Task cards are bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-3 rounded-lg hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs but stripped of visual noise. Active tab gets text-white and a 2px bottom border of #FAFAFA. Inactive tabs are text-zinc-500.
components.schema_tables: Use border-collapse with border-b border-zinc-800 for rows. Field types in JetBrains Mono.
components.ai_chat_bubbles: User: border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50. AI: bg-[#FF4400]/10 border border-[#FF4400]/20. Both rounded-lg p-4.

motion.hover: Subtle background color shifts and transform -translate-y-[1px] for interactive cards.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y-4 to 0) for lists and dashboard metrics.
motion.ai_loading: Use a pulsing animation on the AI magic accent color to indicate processing.

assets.icons: lucide-react for all system iconography. Keep stroke-width to 1.5 for elegance.

images.description: Dark modern office workspace to serve as the background of the landing page hero section. Use with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-black/60).
Dark textured surface for card backgrounds or the empty state of the project workspace to add premium depth.

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: Codebase uses .js (React), NOT .tsx. Implement all components in standard JavaScript.
Setup Google Fonts or local font imports for 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono'.
Use pure Tailwind classes for layout structures (flex/grid) instead of over-relying on restrictive generic components.
Implement Shadcn/UI for inputs, dialogs, selects, and dropdowns, but heavily customize them to match the dark zinc aesthetic defined here.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, project cards).
Ensure the right-side AI assistant panel remains fixed/sticky while the main content scrolls.
For the Landing Page, place the 'landing_hero' image behind the main header with a heavy black/zinc gradient overlay so white text remains accessible.
